overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player exits a covered industrial walkway into bright sunlight, proceeds along a sidewalk overlooking a concrete channel with the DROMOND building visible, crosses an intersection, and continues down a futuristic urban street with palm trees and holographic billboards.

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway and emerging into bright sunlight

notable_agents.action: two characters with blue and pink hair standing and conversing near the exit

entered.detail: red metal roof structure with industrial beams overhead
painted red structural columns lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered walkway with red structural beams and a dark industrial building wall. Two NPCs with distinctive hair colors stand conversing near the exit. The player walks forward and emerges from the covered area into bright sunlight, transitioning from sheltered to exposed environment.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the exterior of the dark industrial building in bright sunlight, the camera moves past a utility pole toward a corner. As the corner is turned, the view opens to reveal a concrete channel and the expansive Night City skyline with futuristic towers in the distance.

tall palm trees lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to reveal a wide concrete channel with colorful graffiti on its sloped walls. The player walks along an elevated walkway bordered by a white railing, passing the prominent DROMOND building on the right with steam vents visible. Palm trees line the path and other pedestrians are seen walking and taking photos.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: approaches intersection and waits at red traffic light
traffic light turns green and begins crossing street with pedestrians
finishes crossing intersection and continues along opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at traffic light then crossing the street with other pedestrians

large glowing green holographic advertisement display
modern glass and steel structures with neon accents

segments.scene_description: Approaching an urban intersection, the player waits at a red traffic light before crossing on green. Vehicles pass through the intersection while pedestrians cross together. A large green holographic billboard becomes visible on the right, and futuristic buildings line the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with holographic advertising

agents.ego_description: continuing down sidewalk past holographic billboard and palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt and red cowboy hat walking past

entered.detail: tall street lamps with orange glowing lights
futuristic aircraft flying in the sky above the city

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the sidewalk past the intersection, the player walks alongside the glowing green holographic billboard and palm trees. Futuristic street lights line the left side of the path, and flying vehicles can be seen in the sky above the distant city towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered industrial corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched urban sprawl of Night City. It begins inside a covered walkway with red structural beams, moving past conversing NPCs before emerging from the shadows into bright, direct sunlight. As the camera rounds the corner of a dark industrial building, the view opens to reveal a wide concrete channel adorned with graffiti and the towering skyline of the city in the distance. The path then leads along an elevated walkway bordered by a white railing, passing the steam vents of the DROMOND building and palm trees before pausing at a busy urban intersection. Finally, the scene shifts across the street as the light turns green, proceeding past a massive glowing green holographic billboard and futuristic street lights while flying vehicles drift above the distant towers.
